text: Le décorateur `@Length()` génère la contrainte `isLength` au lieu de `minLength`/`maxLength`. Il faut utiliser `@MinLength()` et `@MaxLength()` séparément.

input.old_string:
import {
  IsNotEmpty,
  Length,
  IsDate,
  ValidateBy,
  ValidationOptions,
  buildMessage,
} from 'class-validator'
input.new_string:
import {
  IsNotEmpty,
  MinLength,
  MaxLength,
  IsDate,
  ValidateBy,
  ValidationOptions,
  buildMessage,
} from 'class-validator'
